nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Rain and a chance of thunderstorms before 4am, then a chance of thunderstorms and a chance of rain. Cloudy. Low around 50, with temperatures rising to around 54 overnight. South southeast wind 8 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 17 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday
nws.shortForecast: Light Rain Likely then Chance T-storms
nws.detailedForecast: Rain likely and a chance of thunderstorms before 8am, then a chance of thunderstorms and a chance of rain between 8am and 9am, then a chance of rain and a slight chance of thunderstorms between 9am and noon, then a chance of thunderstorms and a chance of rain between noon and 4pm, then rain likely and a chance of thunderstorms. Cloudy. High near 68, with temperatures falling to around 60 in the afternoon. South southwest wind 9 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain and a chance of thunderstorms before 10pm, then a chance of thunderstorms and a chance of rain between 10pm and 1am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 31, with temperatures rising to around 33 overnight. Northwest wind around 18 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
